name: concept_set_requires_descendant_expansion
description: When defining concept sets for cohort queries, descendant concepts should be retrieved using concept_ancestor unless explicitly restricted to the exact concept.
logic: If a concept set query filters only on a single concept_id without checking concept_ancestor for descendants and the use case implies hierarchical inclusion, flag a warning.

name: concept_set_filters_invalid_concepts
description: Concept sets should exclude invalid concepts.
logic: Ensure concept.invalid_reason IS NULL when retrieving concept sets.

name: concept_set_standard_only_for_clinical_queries
description: Clinical queries should use standard concepts rather than source concepts.
logic: If concept sets include concepts where standard_concept IS NULL and the query targets clinical tables, flag a warning.

name: condition_era_requires_persistence_window
description: Condition eras are typically constructed using a persistence window (commonly 30 days) to merge adjacent condition occurrences.
logic: If condition eras are generated without applying a persistence window between condition_end_date and next condition_start_date, flag a warning.

name: drug_era_gap_days_logic
description: Drug eras should merge exposures if the gap between them is below the persistence window.
logic: If drug era construction does not check gap_days or persistence window logic, flag a warning.

name: event_within_any_observation_period
description: Clinical events should fall within at least one observation_period record for the person.
logic: Ensure event_date BETWEEN observation_period_start_date AND observation_period_end_date.

name: multiple_observation_periods_supported
description: Persons can have multiple observation periods; queries should account for this possibility.
logic: If queries assume a single observation_period per person without aggregation or proper join conditions, flag a warning.

name: measurement_units_should_be_standardized
description: Measurement comparisons should be performed on standardized units.
logic: If queries compare measurement.value_as_number across records without filtering or grouping by unit_concept_id, flag a warning.

name: unit_conversion_required_for_cross_unit_comparison
description: If measurements with different unit_concept_id values are compared directly, unit normalization or conversion should be applied.
logic: Detect comparisons across multiple unit_concept_id values without normalization.

name: episode_requires_episode_concept_filter
description: Episode queries should filter by episode_concept_id to specify episode type.
logic: If episode table is queried without filtering episode_concept_id, flag a warning.

name: episode_event_join_validation
description: episode_event should join to the correct event table based on event_field_concept_id.
logic: Ensure episode_event.event_id joins to the correct domain table using event_field_concept_id mapping.

name: fact_relationship_requires_relationship_concept
description: fact_relationship rows should specify a valid relationship concept.
logic: Ensure relationship_concept_id references a valid concept in the Concept table.

name: fact_relationship_domain_pair_validation
description: fact_relationship should link compatible domain records.
logic: Validate that domain_concept_id_1 and domain_concept_id_2 correspond to valid OMOP domains.
